title: Restful API could not create IDMapping
body:
### Issue Description




Restful API could not create IDMapping information? and also using "http://d/vx.x.x" could not make macvlan interface correct when create container.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create container use RESTful API from [reference](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#tag/containers/operation/ContainerCreateLibpod)
```
curl --unix-socket /tmp/podman.sock -X POST \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
  "Image": "localhost/vplcnextcontrol1000-x86-64:latest",
  "name": "test01",
  "hostname": "test01",
  "HostConfig": {
    "AutoCreateWorkDir": true,
    "Devices": [
      {
        "PathOnHost": "/dev/fuse",
        "PathInContainer": "/dev/fuse",
        "CgroupPermissions": "rwm"
      },
      {
        "PathOnHost": "/dev/net/tun",
        "PathInContainer": "/dev/net/tun",
        "CgroupPermissions": "rwm"
      }
    ],
    "CapAdd": ["ALL"],
    "SecurityOpt": ["apparmor=unconfined", "unmask=/proc/*"],
    "Ulimits": [
      {"Name": "rtprio", "Soft": -1, "Hard": -1},
      {"Name": "core", "Soft": -1, "Hard": -1},
      {"Name": "nofile", "Soft": 1024, "Hard": 100000}
    ],
    "IDMappings": {
      "UidMap": [{"ContainerId": 0, "HostId": 30000, "Size": 10000}],
      "GidMap": [{"ContainerId": 0, "HostId": 30000, "Size": 10000}]
    }
  },
  "NetworkingConfig": {
    "EndpointsConfig": {
      "pn_vlan": {
        "IPAMConfig": {"IPv4Address": "192.168.1.10"},
        "MacAddress": "00:a0:de:ad:be:ef"
      },
      "podman": {}
    }
  }
}' \
   http://d/v5.0.0/libpod/containers/create
```

2. podman inspect the container


**GID/UID Mapping is not create.**



### Describe the results you received

why it can not be create ?

### Describe the results you expected

when i use CLI
```
podman create \
  --name test01 \
  --hostname test01 \
  --device /dev/fuse:/dev/fuse:rwm \
  --device /dev/net/tun:/dev/net/tun:rwm \
  --cap-add ALL \
  --security-opt apparmor=unconfined \
  --security-opt unmask=/proc/* \
  --ulimit rtprio=-1:-1 \
  --ulimit core=-1:-1 \
  --ulimit nofile=1024:100000 \
  --uidmap 0:30000:10000 \
  --gidmap 0:30000:10000 \
  --network pn_vlan:ip=192.168.1.10,mac=00:a0:de:ad:be:ef \
  --network podman \
  localhost/vplcnextcontrol1000-x86-64:latest \
  /sbin/init
```

@Leeable The provided payload is incorrect. The `/libpod/containers/create` endpoint doesn't support the `podman inspect` output. Furthermore, the Podman API doesn't report errors for invalid payloads (e.g., incorrect key names or unexpected values).
